overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a sunlit palace terrace with white stone architecture, statues, and ornate balustrades overlooking a scenic valley. The character walks along the terrace, ascends a grand staircase, and enters covered archways with detailed murals and flower beds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open palace terrace with valley overlook

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the terrace edge, passing stone statues and overlooking the valley

notable_agents.action: standing by the balustrade looking out at the valley

entered.detail: large winged stone statue on pedestal
ornate stone railing with arched openings overlooking valley
distant landscape with lake and mountains under teal sky
white stone palace with spires and red roofs
metal fire bowl with orange flames

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit palace terrace with a large stone angel statue to the left and ornate balustrades overlooking a scenic valley. The white stone palace architecture frames the right side while a lit brazier burns nearby, and an NPC stands gazing at the distant mountains.

events.description: turning toward palace building entrance, leaving open terrace edge

agents.ego_description: turning right to follow the terrace curve toward the main building

entered.detail: base of wide stone staircase leading upward

segments.scene_description: The character turns right along the terrace curve, moving closer to the palace building facade. The open valley view gives way to the imposing stone architecture ahead, with the base of a staircase becoming visible in the distance.

events.description: entering shaded walkway along building wall, lighting becomes softer and diffused

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered walkway beside the palace wall

entered.detail: lush purple flowering shrubs along the walkway edge
stone archway providing shade over the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a shaded walkway beside the palace wall, the scene becomes more enclosed with purple flowering bushes lining the right side. The bright sky is mostly blocked by the building overhang, creating softer diffused lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase ascending to upper terrace

events.description: beginning ascent of wide stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the upper terrace level

entered.detail: wide stone steps with worn edges leading upward
tall stone statue at the top of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand stone staircase, with the palace building now on the right and a large statue visible at the top. The lighting mixes bright sunlight and shadows as the stairs climb toward the upper terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace with mural and covered archway

events.description: reaching top of stairs, entering upper terrace with large landscape mural
passing palace guards standing in the covered archway corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper terrace, examining the mural and approaching the archway

notable_agents.action: palace guards standing at attention in the archway corridor

entered.detail: large painted landscape mural on the palace wall depicting mountains and forests
vibrant red flowers planted along the mural base
ornate Gothic archway leading into the palace interior

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the upper terrace, the character approaches a large landscape mural with red flower beds at its base. The scene transitions into a covered archway corridor where palace guards stand at attention, and the architecture features ornate Gothic details with filtered sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, sunlit palace terrace into the enclosed, ornate corridors of the upper estate. It begins with Geralt walking past a stone angel statue and burning brazier along a white balustrade that overlooks a vast scenic valley. As the character turns right, the expansive mountain view is gradually replaced by the imposing stone facade of the palace, leading into a shaded walkway lined with purple flowering bushes. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a grand stone staircase, moving through a play of bright sunlight and deep shadows toward a large statue at the summit. Finally, the path opens onto an upper terrace featuring a landscape mural and red flower beds before transitioning into a covered Gothic archway where palace guards stand at attention under filtered light.
